{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Content Generation and Growth Expert",
  "description": "CodeByte is a forward-thinking, innovative company dedicated to delivering cutting-edge technology solutions that cater to the unique needs of businesses across various industries. With a focus on creativity, efficiency, and user-centered design, we offer a range of services that help our clients stay ahead of the curve in an ever-evolving digital landscape.

Founded by a team of experienced professionals with deep expertise in software development, design, and IT consulting, We Design Tech Solutions specializes in providing tailored tech services, including web development, mobile app development, custom software solutions, and IT support. Our team works closely with clients to understand their goals, challenges, and vision, ensuring that we deliver solutions that drive success and growth. We are committed to helping businesses streamline their operations, enhance their digital presence, and leverage technology to unlock new opportunities. Whether you are a small startup or a large enterprise, CodeByteis your trusted partner for all your tech needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Content Generation and Growth Expert
Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT), Enugu, Lagos, and Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Position Overview


	We are seeking a dynamic and results-driven Social Media Content Generation and Growth Expert to join our marketing team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for creating compelling, engaging, and brand-aligned content across multiple social media platforms while strategically driving audience growth, engagement, and brand awareness.
	This role requires a blend of creative content development skills, data-driven growth strategies, and deep understanding of social media trends and algorithms.


Key Responsibilities
Content Generation:


	Develop and execute a comprehensive social media content strategy aligned with brand goals and marketing campaigns.
	Create high-quality, engaging, and original content including posts, stories, videos, reels, infographics, and other multimedia formats tailored to each platform (e.g.,Instagram,Facebook,LinkedIn,Twitter,TikTok,YouTube).
	Collaborate with graphic designers, videographers, and copywriters to produce visually appealing and on-brand content.
	Maintain a consistent brand voice and messaging across all social media channels.
	Plan and manage content calendars to ensure timely and relevant posting.
	Monitor and respond to audience interactions to foster community engagement and brand loyalty.


Growth Strategy and Execution:


	Design and implement innovative growth strategies to increase followers, engagement rates, and overall social media presence.
	Utilize data analytics tools to track performance metrics, identify trends, and optimize content and campaigns for maximum reach and impact.
	Conduct competitor analysis and market research to identify opportunities for growth and differentiation.
	Manage paid social media campaigns, including budget allocation, targeting, and performance analysis.
	Experiment with emerging social media platforms and features to stay ahead of trends and capitalize on new growth opportunities.
	Collaborate with influencers, brand ambassadors, and partners to amplify reach and credibility.


Reporting and Analysis:


	Prepare regular reports on social media performance, growth metrics, and ROI.
	Use insights from analytics to refine content strategies and growth tactics continuously.
	Present findings and recommendations to senior management and stakeholders.


Required Skills and Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Marketing, Communications, Digital Media, or a related field.
	Proven experience (3+ years) in social media content creation and growth, preferably in a fast-paced or agency environment.
	Deep understanding of social media platforms, algorithms, best practices, and emerging trends.
	Strong creative skills with proficiency in content creation tools (e.g.,Adobe Creative Suite,Canva, video editing software).
	Expertise in social media analytics tools (e.g.,Google Analytics,Facebook Insights,Sprout Social,Hootsuite).
	Demonstrated ability to develop and execute successful social media growth strategies.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Strong project management skills with the ability to manage multiple campaigns simultaneously.
	Data-driven mindset with the ability to interpret analytics and make strategic decisions.
	Experience managing paid social media advertising campaigns is a plus.
	Knowledge of SEO, email marketing, and other digital marketing channels is advantageous.


Preferred Attributes:


	Passionate about social media trends and digital innovation.
	Creative thinker with a proactive approach to problem-solving.
	Collaborative team player with strong interpersonal skills.
	Adaptable and able to thrive in a fast-changing digital environment.


Reporting Line:


	This position reports to the Marketing Manager/Head of Digital Marketing.


Work Environment:


	Hybrid or remote work options available depending on company policy.
	Fast-paced, innovative, and collaborative team culture.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their &nbsp;CV and cover letter in one document to:&nbsp;alionuche2008@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-11",
  "validThrough": "2026-03-26",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "CodeByte"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Abuja, Enugu, Lagos, Rivers (PH)",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "195746"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 150000,
      "maxValue": 250000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Social Media Content Generation and Growth Expert Job at CodeByte




        
    

        
        CodeByte is a forward-thinking, innovative company dedicated to delivering cutting-edge technology solutions that cater to the unique needs of businesses across various industries. With a focus on creativity, efficiency, and user-centered design, we offer a range of services that help our clients stay ahead of the curve in an ever-evolving digital landscape.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Founded by a team of experienced professionals with deep expertise in software development, design, and IT consulting, We Design Tech Solutions specializes in providing tailored tech services, including web development, mobile app development, custom software solutions, and IT support. Our team works closely with clients to understand their goals, challenges, and vision, ensuring that we deliver solutions that drive success and growth. We are committed to helping businesses streamline their operations, enhance their digital presence, and leverage technology to unlock new opportunities. Whether you are a small startup or a large enterprise, CodeByteis your trusted partner for all your tech needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Content Generation and Growth Expert
Job Location: Abuja (FCT), Enugu, Lagos, and Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Position Overview


	We are seeking a dynamic and results-driven Social Media Content Generation and Growth Expert to join our marketing team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for creating compelling, engaging, and brand-aligned content across multiple social media platforms while strategically driving audience growth, engagement, and brand awareness.
	This role requires a blend of creative content development skills, data-driven growth strategies, and deep understanding of social media trends and algorithms.


Key Responsibilities
Content Generation:


	Develop and execute a comprehensive social media content strategy aligned with brand goals and marketing campaigns.
	Create high-quality, engaging, and original content including posts, stories, videos, reels, infographics, and other multimedia formats tailored to each platform (e.g.,Instagram,Facebook,LinkedIn,Twitter,TikTok,YouTube).
	Collaborate with graphic designers, videographers, and copywriters to produce visually appealing and on-brand content.
	Maintain a consistent brand voice and messaging across all social media channels.
	Plan and manage content calendars to ensure timely and relevant posting.
	Monitor and respond to audience interactions to foster community engagement and brand loyalty.


Growth Strategy and Execution:


	Design and implement innovative growth strategies to increase followers, engagement rates, and overall social media presence.
	Utilize data analytics tools to track performance metrics, identify trends, and optimize content and campaigns for maximum reach and impact.
	Conduct competitor analysis and market research to identify opportunities for growth and differentiation.
	Manage paid social media campaigns, including budget allocation, targeting, and performance analysis.
	Experiment with emerging social media platforms and features to stay ahead of trends and capitalize on new growth opportunities.
	Collaborate with influencers, brand ambassadors, and partners to amplify reach and credibility.


Reporting and Analysis:


	Prepare regular reports on social media performance, growth metrics, and ROI.
	Use insights from analytics to refine content strategies and growth tactics continuously.
	Present findings and recommendations to senior management and stakeholders.


Required Skills and Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Digital Media, or a related field.
	Proven experience (3+ years) in social media content creation and growth, preferably in a fast-paced or agency environment.
	Deep understanding of social media platforms, algorithms, best practices, and emerging trends.
	Strong creative skills with proficiency in content creation tools (e.g.,Adobe Creative Suite,Canva, video editing software).
	Expertise in social media analytics tools (e.g.,Google Analytics,Facebook Insights,Sprout Social,Hootsuite).
	Demonstrated ability to develop and execute successful social media growth strategies.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Strong project management skills with the ability to manage multiple campaigns simultaneously.
	Data-driven mindset with the ability to interpret analytics and make strategic decisions.
	Experience managing paid social media advertising campaigns is a plus.
	Knowledge of SEO, email marketing, and other digital marketing channels is advantageous.


Preferred Attributes:


	Passionate about social media trends and digital innovation.
	Creative thinker with a proactive approach to problem-solving.
	Collaborative team player with strong interpersonal skills.
	Adaptable and able to thrive in a fast-changing digital environment.


Reporting Line:


	This position reports to the Marketing Manager/Head of Digital Marketing.


Work Environment:


	Hybrid or remote work options available depending on company policy.
	Fast-paced, innovative, and collaborative team culture.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month. 

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their  CV and cover letter in one document to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Website Designer / Developer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Part-time

Main Objective


	We&rsquo;re expanding our digital presence and seeking a creative, tech-savvy individual to join our team.
	To design, develop, and maintain a professional website that promotes travel services, generates enquiries, and supports online bookings.


Salary
N60,000 - N90,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidate should Send their CV and cover letter&nbsp;to:&nbsp;mracross007@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Website Designer / Developer Job at Across Global Travel & Tours Limited




        
    

        
        Across Global Travel & Tours Limited has been Nigeria’s trusted travel agency for over 20 years, helping clients with visas, study abroad, work permits, tours, and flight bookings.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Website Designer / Developer

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Part-time

Main Objective
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We’re expanding our digital presence and seeking a creative, tech-savvy individual to join our team.
	To design, develop, and maintain a professional website that promotes travel services, generates enquiries, and supports online bookings.


Salary
N60,000 - N90,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidate should Send their CV and cover letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Entry-Level Business Development Officer Job at Buckler Systems




        
    

        
        Buckler Systems is a Nigerian defense solutions provider with strong expertise in manufacturing civilian armored vehicles, design, and prototyping of military vehicles and ordnance equipment.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Entry-Level Business Development Officer
Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Position Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are in search of a highly skilled and motivated Business Development Officer to join our dynamic Business Development team.
	This role is integral to enhancing our organizational culture and ensuring that our Business Development aligns with our strategic goals.
	The successful candidate will be a Professional Business Developer with a deep understanding of Strategic Planning and Implementation, Customer Management, Market Analysis and Budgeting.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement effective business development strategies to meet Buckler Systems’ growth targets.
	Identify and evaluate new market opportunities, industry trends, and competitive landscape.
	Proactively identify and generate new business leads through research, networking, and industry events.
	Develop and maintain a robust pipeline of potential clients and business opportunities.
	Cultivate and maintain strong relationships with key stakeholders and decision-makers.
	Understand client needs and provide customized solutions to meet their requirements.
	Prepare and deliver compelling proposals and presentations to prospective clients.
	Negotiate terms and close agreements to achieve revenue targets and foster long-term partnerships.
	Work closely with internal teams, including Sales, Marketing, and Product Development, to align strategies and ensure successful execution of business development initiatives.
	Collaborate on the development of marketing materials and client-facing content.
	Track and analyze business development performance metrics, including lead conversion rates, sales forecasts, and revenue growth.
	Provide regular updates and insights to senior management on progress and outcomes.
	Stay current with industry developments, emerging technologies, and competitive activities.
	Use market insights to inform strategy and enhance the company’s competitive positioning.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or a related field.
	0 - 2 years of experience in business development, sales, or a related field, with a demonstrated track record of success leading a relevant team in achieving business growth and developing strategic partnerships
	Experience in the automobile industry is an added advantage.
	Strong Leadership, communication, negotiation, presentation and reporting skills, ability to think strategically and analytically to drive business outcomes.
	Proficiency with Microsoft Suites, CRM software and business analytics tools.


Why Join Buckler Systems?


	Competitive Compensation: We offer a competitive salary and a comprehensive benefits package.
	Innovative Environment: Be part of a cutting-edge company dedicated to innovation and excellence.
	Professional Growth: Opportunities for career advancement and professional development.
	Supportive Culture: Join a team that values collaboration, diversity, and mutual respect.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Finance Associate",
  "description": "Black Pelican Group, established in 2004, is Nigeria&rsquo;s foremost lifestyle solutions group and a leader in total interior solutions, providing end-to-end services through its subsidiaries &ndash; IL Bagno (premium luxury finishes), Bathrooms Direct (affordable sanitary wares, tiles, and doors), Bagno Technik (specialized installation and maintenance), BPL Logistix (integrated logistics, warehousing, and delivery), and BPL Wellness (fitness and wellness through an exclusive partnership with Technogym). With a strong reputation for excellence, we deliver world-class designs, products, and services that seamlessly cater to the luxury market, while upholding the highest standards of professionalism, innovation, continuous learning, and corporate social responsibility.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Senior Finance Associate

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Work Mode:&nbsp;Onsite

Role Overview


	The Senior Finance Associate will play a critical role in supporting the financial management and reporting functions of Black Pelican Group.
	The role is responsible for budgeting, financial analysis, regulatory compliance, treasury management, and ensuring the integrity of financial reporting systems.
	The ideal candidate will provide accurate financial insights to support strategic decision-making while maintaining strong financial controls and compliance with statutory and regulatory requirements.


Key Responsibilities
Financial Planning, Analysis, and Reporting:


	Support the preparation of monthly budgets, cash flow projections, and financial forecasts, including variance analysis and performance insights.
	Coordinate core accounting activities and ensure accurate and timely financial reporting across the organization.
	Consolidate group financial accounts and ensure compliance with applicable accounting standards and reporting requirements.
	Provide value-added financial and management reports to support informed decision-making by senior management.
	Assist in the preparation and presentation of financial information for internal and external reporting purposes.


Financial Controls and Systems Management:


	Maintain and periodically review financial reporting systems to ensure they effectively track financial performance and support operational efficiency.
	Establish and enforce strong control mechanisms across purchase and sales ledgers.
	Review financial data processing and operational systems within the Finance function and recommend improvements to enhance efficiency and accuracy.
	Manage general ledger activities and ensure proper reconciliation of sub-ledgers.


Treasury and Cash Management:


	Support treasury management activities, including cash flow monitoring, fund flow management, and liquidity planning.
	Provide weekly updates on fund flow and financial position.
	Perform weekly and monthly bank reconciliations to ensure accuracy of financial records.


Regulatory Compliance and Statutory Reporting:


	Ensure compliance with applicable financial regulations, statutory requirements, and internal financial policies.
	Manage statutory remittances, including Value Added Tax (VAT), Withholding Tax (WHT), and Pay-As-You-Earn (PAYE).
	Support the implementation and monitoring of financial policies and procedures to ensure consistent and accurate reporting across entities.


Operational Finance Support:


	Process and post payment vouchers and maintain proper documentation for financial transactions.
	Assist in providing financial information for various reporting entities within the group.
	Support the development and implementation of sound financial controls, procedures, and policies.
	Perform other finance-related duties as assigned by the line manager.


Qualifications and Experience


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related discipline.
	Minimum of eight (8) years of relevant professional experience in accounting or finance roles.
	Professional certification as a Chartered Accountant (e.g., ICAN, ACCA, or equivalent) is required.
	Strong working knowledge of Microsoft Excel and other Microsoft Office applications.
	Sound understanding of IFRS reporting standards and financial reporting practices.


Core Competencies:


	Financial Planning and Analysis
	Financial Reporting and Compliance
	Data and Information Management
	Financial Systems Proficiency
	Strong Financial Acumen
	Planning and Organizational Skills
	High Attention to Detail
	Analytical and Problem-Solving Skills


Why Join Black Pelican Group?


	Be part of a people-focused organization that prioritizes employee welfare, creating a supportive environment that promotes stability, well-being, and long-term career success.
	Accelerate your professional growth through structured learning, hands-on financial management experience, and continuous development opportunities that strengthen your expertise in finance and corporate reporting.
	Gain strategic exposure by contributing to financial planning, reporting, and decision-making processes that support major projects and the overall growth of the business.
	Build your career with a reputable lifestyle solutions brand known for delivering quality, innovation, and excellence across its operations.
	Thrive in a high-performance environment where accountability, results, and financial insight are valued, and strong performance is recognized with meaningful career advancement opportunities.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-11",
  "validThrough": "2026-04-12",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Black Pelican Limited"
    
  },

    "@type": "Place",

      "@type": "PostalAddress",

      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",

      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }

Senior Finance Associate Job at Black Pelican Limited




        
    

        
        Black Pelican Group, established in 2004, is Nigeria’s foremost lifestyle solutions group and a leader in total interior solutions, providing end-to-end services through its subsidiaries – IL Bagno (premium luxury finishes), Bathrooms Direct (affordable sanitary wares, tiles, and doors), Bagno Technik (specialized installation and maintenance), BPL Logistix (integrated logistics, warehousing, and delivery), and BPL Wellness (fitness and wellness through an exclusive partnership with Technogym). With a strong reputation for excellence, we deliver world-class designs, products, and services that seamlessly cater to the luxury market, while upholding the highest standards of professionalism, innovation, continuous learning, and corporate social responsibility.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Finance Associate

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Work Mode: Onsite

Role Overview


	The Senior Finance Associate will play a critical role in supporting the financial management and reporting functions of Black Pelican Group.
	The role is responsible for budgeting, financial analysis, regulatory compliance, treasury management, and ensuring the integrity of financial reporting systems.
	The ideal candidate will provide accurate financial insights to support strategic decision-making while maintaining strong financial controls and compliance with statutory and regulatory requirements.


Key Responsibilities
Financial Planning, Analysis, and Reporting:


	Support the preparation of monthly budgets, cash flow projections, and financial forecasts, including variance analysis and performance insights.
	Coordinate core accounting activities and ensure accurate and timely financial reporting across the organization.
	Consolidate group financial accounts and ensure compliance with applicable accounting standards and reporting requirements.
	Provide value-added financial and management reports to support informed decision-making by senior management.
	Assist in the preparation and presentation of financial information for internal and external reporting purposes.


Financial Controls and Systems Management:


	Maintain and periodically review financial reporting systems to ensure they effectively track financial performance and support operational efficiency.
	Establish and enforce strong control mechanisms across purchase and sales ledgers.
	Review financial data processing and operational systems within the Finance function and recommend improvements to enhance efficiency and accuracy.
	Manage general ledger activities and ensure proper reconciliation of sub-ledgers.


Treasury and Cash Management:


	Support treasury management activities, including cash flow monitoring, fund flow management, and liquidity planning.
	Provide weekly updates on fund flow and financial position.
	Perform weekly and monthly bank reconciliations to ensure accuracy of financial records.


Regulatory Compliance and Statutory Reporting:


	Ensure compliance with applicable financial regulations, statutory requirements, and internal financial policies.
	Manage statutory remittances, including Value Added Tax (VAT), Withholding Tax (WHT), and Pay-As-You-Earn (PAYE).
	Support the implementation and monitoring of financial policies and procedures to ensure consistent and accurate reporting across entities.


Operational Finance Support:


	Process and post payment vouchers and maintain proper documentation for financial transactions.
	Assist in providing financial information for various reporting entities within the group.
	Support the development and implementation of sound financial controls, procedures, and policies.
	Perform other finance-related duties as assigned by the line manager.


Qualifications and Experience


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related discipline.
	Minimum of eight (8) years of relevant professional experience in accounting or finance roles.
	Professional certification as a Chartered Accountant (e.g., ICAN, ACCA, or equivalent) is required.
	Strong working knowledge of Microsoft Excel and other Microsoft Office applications.
	Sound understanding of IFRS reporting standards and financial reporting practices.


Core Competencies:


	Financial Planning and Analysis
	Financial Reporting and Compliance
	Data and Information Management
	Financial Systems Proficiency
	Strong Financial Acumen
	Planning and Organizational Skills
	High Attention to Detail
	Analytical and Problem-Solving Skills


Why Join Black Pelican Group?


	Be part of a people-focused organization that prioritizes employee welfare, creating a supportive environment that promotes stability, well-being, and long-term career success.
	Accelerate your professional growth through structured learning, hands-on financial management experience, and continuous development opportunities that strengthen your expertise in finance and corporate reporting.
	Gain strategic exposure by contributing to financial planning, reporting, and decision-making processes that support major projects and the overall growth of the business.
	Build your career with a reputable lifestyle solutions brand known for delivering quality, innovation, and excellence across its operations.
	Thrive in a high-performance environment where accountability, results, and financial insight are valued, and strong performance is recognized with meaningful career advancement opportunities.
